messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Onboarding a target repo provisions its own Telegram bot and group, so the contract can be negotiated there
What it solves: WHAT ALREADY WORKS — DO NOT REBUILD IT. Topic creation is already automated and reusable:
`createForumTopic` (`extension/src/notify/telegramClient.ts:196`) mints a topic, and
`ensureOperatorTopic` (`extension/src/tools/telegram-front-desk-bot.ts:253`) already shows the
mint-and-register pattern. Th…
How it works: Onboarding tells the human exactly how to create the channel

messages.author: swarm
